Answer_original: SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) DESC;
SELECT song FROM Track WHERE NOT EXIST (  SELECT * FROM Performs  WHERE Performs.track_id = Track.track_id  AND role = 'vocals');
SELECT Performs.artist_id FROM Performs WHERE role = 'guitarist';

WITH RECURSIVE managers(id) AS (   SELECT E.manager_nr AS id   FROM Employee E   WHERE E.employee_nr = 'U000001' UNION   SELECT E.manager_nr AS id   FROM managers M, Employee E   WHERE M.id = E.id   AND NOT E.manager_nr IS NULL )  SELECT * FROM managers;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.tracks_id) AS least3 FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(P.tracks_id) >2 ORDER BY least3 DESC;
SELECT T.song FROM Track T JOIN Performs P ON T.track_id = P.track_id WHERE P.role <> 'vocals';
SELECT song FROM Track, Performs WHERE NOT role = 'vocals' AND NOT artist_id = NULL AND Track.track_id =  Performs.track_id;
SELECT name FROM Artist WHERE death_date = NULL;

(SELECT Employee1.employee_nr FROM Employee1, Employee2 WHERE Employee1.employee_nr = 'U000001' AND Employee1.employee_nr = Employee2.manager_nr) UNION (SELECT Employee1.employee_nr FROM Employee1, Employee2 WHERE  Employee1.employee_nr = Employee2.manager_nr);
SELECT A.name, COUNT(T.*) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(T.*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(T.*) DESC;
SELECT T.song FROM Track T, Performs P WHERE T.track_id = P.track_id AND NOT EXISTS (   SELECT role FROM Performs P2 WHERE T.track_id = P2.track_id AND role='vocals' );

WITH RECURSION Managed(employee_nr) AS (   SELECT E.manager_nr AS employee_nr   FROM Employee E   WHERE E.employee_number = 'U000001' UNION   SELECT E.manager_nr AS employee_nr   FROM Managed M, Employee E   WHERE M.employee_nr = E.employee_nr   AND NOT E.manager_nr IS NULL ) SELECT * FROM Managed;
SELECT DISTINCT album_id  FROM Release  WHERE country = ´Belgium´;
SELECT song, Track.track_id, role FROM Track, Performance WHERE Performs.track_id = Track.track_id  AND role != 'vocals' ;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id FROM Performs WHERE role = ´guitaist´;
SELECT name FROM Artist WHERE death_date = NULL;
SELECT song FROM Track WHERE album_id = 'Nevermind';
SELECT title, COUNT(duration) AS total_duration FROM Album GROUP BY title ;
SELECT album_id, country FROM Release WHERE country ='Belgium' ;
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(track_id) AS Number_of_tracks FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(track_id) => 3 ORDER BY Number_of_tracks DESC ;
SELECT song, album_id FROM Track, Album WHERE title = 'Nevermind' AND  Album.album_id= Track.album_id ;

WITH RECURSIVE managed AS ( (SELECT Employ.manager_nr AS manager, Employ.employee_nr AS descendant, 1 AS depth  FROM Employee AS Employ  WHERE Employee.employee_nr = 'U000001') UNION  (SELECT Old.manager, Employ.employee_nr, Old.depth +1 FROM managed AS Old JOIN Employee as Employ ON Old.descendant= Employ.manager_nr)  ) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM managed;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id, role, track_id FROM Performs, Track  WHERE role = 'guitarist'  AND Performs.track_id= Track.track_id ;
SELECT songs, role FROM Track, Performs WHERE Performs.track_id= Track.track_id AND role != vocal AND Performs.artist_id IS NOT NULL ;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(T.track_id) AS count FROM Track T, Artist A, Preforms P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id AND count > 2 GROUP BY A.name ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT T.song FROM Track T WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT P.track_id FROM Preforms P WHERE P.role = 'vocals');
SELECT P.artist_id FROM Preforms P WHERE P.role = 'guitarist';

WITH DistinctTracks ( artist_id, track_id ) AS ( SELECT DISTINCT Artist.artist_id, track_id FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs ) SELECT name, count(track_id) FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN DistinctTracks GROUP BY artist_id HAVING count(track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY count(track_id) DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS Nr FROM Artist WHERE artist_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT track_id, artist_id FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id=Performs.track_id) GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY Nr DESC;
SELECT T.song FROM Track T WHERE NOT EXISTS  (SELECT P.role FROM Performs P WHERE T.artist_id = P.artist_id AND role = 'vocals');

SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id  = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) DESC;
SELECT A.title, SUM(T.duration) FROM Album A JOIN Track T ON A.album_id = T.album_id GROUP BY A.album_id;

WITH RECURSIVE Manager(Employee_nr) AS ( SELECT Employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE employee_nr = 'U000001' UNION SELECT E.Manager_nr AS manager FROM Employee E, Manager M WHERE M.manager = E.manager AND NOT E.manager IS NULL )  SELECT * FROM Manager;
SELECT DISTINCT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Album, Track WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id;

WITH RECURSIVE ManagedBy (employee_nr) AS (    SELECT E.employee_nr AS employee_nr    FROM Employee E    WHERE E.employee_nr = 'U000001'   UNION    SELECT E.manager_nr AS employee_nr    FROM ManagedBy M, Employee E    WHERE M.employee_nr = E.employee_nr    AND NOT E.manager_nr IS NULL )  SELECT * FROM ManagedBy;

SELECT DISTINCT Track.song FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM Artist WHERE (Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.role = 'vocals') OR (Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.artist_id IS NULL));
SELECT Album.album_id FROM Album A, Release R WHERE A.album_id = R.album_id AND R.country = ´Belgium´;
SELECT DISTINCT A.name, COUNT(*) as ntracks FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND T.track_id = P.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(*) >=3 ORDER BY ntracks DESC;
SELECT name FROM Artist WHERE NOT death_rate IS NULL;
SELECT Track.song FROM Track T, Album A WHERE T.album_id = A.album_id AND A.title = 'Nevermind';
SELECT a.title, SUM(t.duration) AS total_duration FROM Album a, Track t WHERE a.album_id = t.album_id;
SELECT name FROM Artist WHERE death_date = NULL;

WITH RECURSIVE Managed AS( SELECT employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE manager_nr = 'U000001' UNION Select managed.employee_nr FROM Employee managed JOIN Employee manager on manager.employee_nr = managed.employee_nr JOIN Managed m ON manager.manager_nr = m.employee_nr ) SELECT * FROM Managed;
SELECT album_id FROM Release WHERE country = ´Belgium´;
SELECT DISTINCT a.artist_id FROM Artist a, Performs p WHERE a.artist_id = p.artist_id AND p.role = ´guitarist´;
SELECT t.song FROM Track t, Performs p WHERE t.track_id = p.track_id AND NOT p.artist_id IN(   SELECT p.artist_id   FROM Performs p   WHERE p.role = 'vocals' ) HAVING COUNT(p.artist_id) > 0;

SELECT a.name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) AS nr_of_tracks FROM Artist a JOIN Performs p ON a.artist_id = p.artist_id GROUP BY a.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY nr_of_tracks DESC, a.name;
SELECT Performs.artist_id FROM Performs WHERE Performs.role = ´guitarist´;

SELECT DISTINCT Track.song FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT Performs.track_id FROM Performs WHERE Performs.role = ´vocals´ OR Performs.role IS NULL);
SELECT Track.song FROM Track, Album WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id AND Album.title = ´Nevermind´;
SELECT Release.album_id FROM Release WHERE Release.country = ´Belgium´;
SELECT Artist.name FROM Artist WHERE Artist.death_date IS NOT NULL;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;

SELECT Track.song FROM Track WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT Performs.role FROM Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Performs.role = ´vocals´);  -- since Performs.artist_id is a foreign key referencing to Artist.artist_id, where it is a primary key (as well), and primary keys are assumed to be NOT NULL, it seems unnecesarry to add this to the query
SELECT DISTINCT Artist.artist_id FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.role = ´guitarist´;
SELECT Track.song FROM Track, Album WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id AND Album.title = ´Nevermind´;
SELECT Album.album_id FROM Album, Release WHERE Album.album_id = Release.album_id AND Release.country = ´Belgium´;

WITH RECURSIVE Managedby(manager) AS (   SELECT M.manager_nr AS manager   FROM Employee E, Employee M   WHERE E.manager_nr = M.employee_nr   UNION   SELECT M.manager AS manager   FROM Managedby E, Employee M   WHERE E.manager_nr = M.employee_nr   AND NOT M.manager_nr IS NULL )  SELECT * FROM Managedby;

Select A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) AS nr_of_tracks_with_performance From Artist A, Performs P Where A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(nr_of_tracks_with_performance) >=3 ORDER BY nr_of_tracks_with_performance DESC

WITH RECURSIVE managed_by_U000001 (id) AS ( (SELECT X.employee_nr as id FROM Employee X WHERE X.manager_nr = 'U000001') UNION (SELECT X.employee_nr as id FROM managed_by_U000001 Y, Employee X WHERE Y.id = X.id) ) SELECT * FROM managed_by_U000001
SELECT name FROM Artist WHERE NOT death_date IS NULL
SELECT title, SUM(duration)  FROM album GROUP BY album_id

SELECT T.song FROM Track T, Performs P WHERE T.track_id = P.track_id AND NOT EXISTS(   SELECT track_id   FROM Performs   WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id   AND Performs.role = 'vocals' ) AND T.track_id  IN (  SELECT track_id, COUNT(artist_id) AS known_artist_count  FROM Performs  GROUP BY track_id  HAVING known_artist_count > 0) -- Since I do not know if the schema fills in NULL or an arbitrary string like 'Artist unknown' when an artist for a role on a track is unknown I was unable to use IS NULL with certainty, if this is the intended solution it would be helpful if it were specified.
SELECT DISTINCT A.Artist_id FROM Artist A, Performs P AND A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.role = 'guitarist'
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id)  FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name  HAVING COUNT(track_id) >= 3  ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT songs FROM Track T, Performs P, Artist A WHERE T.track_id=P.track.id AND A.artist_id=P.artist_id  AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT P.artist_id FROM Performs P WHERE T.track_id=P.track.id  AND P.role=´vocals´);
SELECT DISTINCT album_id FROM Album A, Release R WHERE A.album_id=R.album_id AND R.country = ´Belgium´;
WITH RECURSIVE managed(employee_nr) AS( SELECT ´U000001´ UNION SELECT E.employee_nr FROM Employee E, Managed M WHERE E.manager_nr =  M.employee_nr) SELECT * FROM Managed;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id AND P.role=´guitarist´;
SELECT A.title, T.duration FROM Album A, Track T WHERE T.album_id=A.album_id   GROUP BY album_id HAVING COUNT(track_id)>=1;
SELECT song FROM Album WHERE Album.title = ´Nevermind´;
SELECT A.name , COUNT(*) FROM Artist A, Track T WHERE T.album_id=A.album_id   GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(*)>=3;
SELECT album_id  FROM Album, Release  WHERE Album.album_id = Release.album_id AND Release.country = 'Belgium';

SELECT A.name, Count(DISTINCT Performs.artist_id) AS played_by_artist FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id  GROUP BY A.name  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.artist_id) >= 3 ORDER BY played_by_artist DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.role = 'guitarist';
SELECT title, SUM(duration) FROM Album, Track WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id;
SELECT name FROM Artist  WHERE Artist.death_date = 'NULL';
SELECT song FROM Track, Performs, Artist WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id  AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id  AND NOT Performs.role = 'vocals' AND Performs.artist_id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id AND Performs.role = 'guitarist';
SELECT title, SUM(duration) FROM Album, Track WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id;
SELECT album_id FROM Album, Release WHERE Album.album_id = Release.album_id AND Release.country = 'Belgium';
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Track, Album WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id GROUP BY Album.album_id;
SELECT album_id FROM Album WHERE album_id IN (   SELECT album_id   FROM Release   WHERE country = ´Belgium´ );

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) FROM Performs, Artist WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY Performs.artist_id HAVING COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(Performs.track_id) DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE Ancestors(id) AS ( SELECT E.manager_nr as id   FROM Employee E   WHERE E.employee_nr = 'U000001'   UNION   SELECT E.manager_nr as id   FROM Ancestors A, Employee E   WHERE A.id = E.id   AND NOT E.manager_nr IS NULL ) SELECT * FROM Ancestors;
SELECT employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE manager_nr = U000001 OR employee_nr = U000001
SELECT name FROM Artist WHERE death_date IS NOT NULL
SELECT artist_id FROM Perfroms WHERE role = 'guitarist'
SELECT song FROM Track t, Album a WHERE t.album_id = a.album_id AND title = ´Nevermind´
SELECT title, SUM(song) AS album_duration FROM Album a, Track t WHERE a.album_id = t.album_id
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist, Performs p GROUP BY p.artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
SELECT DISTINCT p.artist_id From Performs p WHERE role = ´guitarist´
SELECT song FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND role <> ´vocals´
SELECT r.album_id FROM Release r WHERE country = ´Belgium´
SELECT a.title, SUM(t.duration) FROM Album a INNER JOIN Track t ON a.album_id= t.album_id GROUP BY a.album_id;
SELECT song  FROM Track t WHERE track_id NOT IN (  SELECT track_id FROM Performs p  WHERE role = 'vocals' AND artist_id is NULL);

SELECT a.name, COUNT(t.track_id) AS number_of_tracks FROM Artist a  INNER JOIN Performs p ON a.artist_id= p.artist_id INNER JOIN Track t ON t.Album_id=al.Album_id INNER JOIN Album al ON t.Album_id= al.Album_id INNER JOIN Release r ON r.Album_id= al.Album_id GROUP by a.name ORDER by release_date DESC

WITH RECURSIVE Subordinates AS ( SELECT employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE employee_nr = 'U000001' UNION ( SELECT emp.empoyee_nr FROM Employee emp, Subordinates sub WHERE emp.employee_nr = sub.manager_nr ))  SELECT employee_nr FROM Subordinates;

WITH RECURSIVE managedByU000001(employee_nr) AS (   (SELECT Employee.employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE manager_nr = 'U000001' OR manager_nr IS NULL)   UNION   (SELECT Employee.employee_nr FROM managedByU000001, Employee WHERE managedByU000001.employee_nr = Employee.employee_nr) ) SELECT * FROM managedByU000001;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) AS total FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING total >= 3 ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) as num_tracks FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = (SELECT DISTINCT track_id FROM Performs) GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY num_tracks DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT album_id FROM Album A, Release R WHERE A.album_id = R.album_id AND R.country = ´Belgium´;
SELECT song FROM Track T, Album A WHERE T.album_id = A.album_id AND A.title = ´Nevermind´;
SELECT title, SUM(duration)  FROM Track T, Album A WHERE T.album_id = A.album_id;

WITH RECURSIVE Result(employee_nr) AS (    SELECT E.manager_nr AS employee_nr    FROM Employee E    WHERE E.employee_nr = ´U000001´    UNION    SELECT R.manager_nr AS employee_nr    FROM Result R, Employee E    WHERE R.employee_nr = E.employee_nr    AND NOT R.manager_nr IS NULL ) SELECT * FROM Result;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.role = ´guitarist´;
SELECT DISTINCT song FROM Track T, Artist A, Performs P WHERE T.track_id = P.track_id AND A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.role <> ´vocals´ AND A.name IS NOT NULL;

SELECT song FROM Track T WHERE NOT EXISTS ( -- no vocals SELECT * FROM Performs P WHERE T.track_id = P.track_id AND role = 'vocals') AND T.track_id IN ( -- must have a known artist SELECT P.track_id FROM Performs P);

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, SUM(Track.song) FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND SUM(Performs.track_id) >= 3 GROUP BY Performs.artist_id ORDER BY DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE ManagedBy1 (id_employee) AS( SELECT E.manager_number, E.employee_nr AS id_employee FROM Employee E WHERE E.manager_nr = 'U000001'  UNION  SELECT E.employee_nr AS id_employee FROM Employee E, ManagedBy1 M WHERE E.manager_nr = M.id_employee) SELECT * FROM ManagedBy1;
SELECT Artist.name FROM Artist WHERE Artist.death_date = NULL;
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Album, Track WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id GROUP BY Track.album_id;

SELECT Track.song FROM Track, Performs WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM Performs WHERE Performs.role = 'vocals' AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id)  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = NULL AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id);
SELECT album_id FROM Album, Release WHERE Album.album_id = Release.album_id AND country = 'Belgium';
WITH RECURSIVE manage AS( SELECT employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE manager_nr = 'U000001' UNION SELECT employee_nr FROM manage M, Employee E WHERE M.employee_nr = E.manager_nr ) SELECT * FROM manage;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count FROM Artist, Performs, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING count >= 3 ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration)  FROM Album, Track WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id;

WITH RECURSIVE Managed_by_u000001(manager)AS (  SELECT E.manager_nr AS manager FROM Employee E WHERE E.employee_nr = 'U000001'  UNION  SELECT E.manager_nr AS manager FROM Managed_by_u000001 M, Employee E WHERE M.manager = E.manager AND NOT E.manager_nr IS NULL ) SELECT * FROM Managed_by_u000001;
SELECT name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) AS total_tracks FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING total_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY total_tracks DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT A.name, COUNT(T.track_id) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(T.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(T.track_id) DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE function AS ( SELECT employee_nr AS P FROM Employee WHERE employee_nr = 'U000001' UNION SELECT employee_nr AS C FROM Employee WHERE P.employee_nr = C.manager_nr ) SELECT * FROM function;

SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT, track_id) AS nr FROM Track, Performs, Artist  WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING nr >= 3 ORDER BY nr DESC;
SELECT a.title, SUM(t.duration) AS album_duration FROM Album a, Track t WHERE t.album_id = a.album_id GROUP BY t.album_id;

WITH RECURSIVE Managers (employee_nr) AS (   SELECT e.manager_nr as employee_nr   FROM Employee e   WHERE e.employee_nr = 'U000001' UNION  SELECT e.manager as employee_nr  FROM Managers m, Employee e   WHERE m.employee_nr = e.employee_nr   AND NOT e.manager IS NULL)  SELECT * FROM managers
SELECT t.song FROM Track t, Performs p WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM Performs p WHERE t.track_id = p.track_id AND p.role = 'vocals');

SELECT a.name AS artist_name, COUNT( t.track_id) AS track_count FROM Track t, Artist a, Performs p WHERE t.track_id = p.track_id AND p.artist_id = a.artist_id GROUP BY p.artist_id HAVING COUNT (DISTINCT t.track_id > 3) ORDER BY track_count DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) AS total FROM Track, Artist, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND total >= 3 GROUP BY Artist.name ORDER BY total DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE EmployeesOF (id) AS (   (SELECT X.employee_nr AS id    FROM Employee X    WHERE X.manager_id = 'U000001')   UNION   (SELECT X.employee_nr AS id   FROM EmployeesOF Y, Employee X   WHERE Y.id = X.id) ) SELECT employee_nr FROM EmployeesOf;
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) AS total FROM Track, Album WHERE Album.album_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY Album.title;
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Track, Album WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id;

WITH RECURSIVE Chain(employee_nr) AS(  SELECT Employee.employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE manager_nr = 'U000001'  UNION  SELECT Employee.employee_nr FROM Chain, Employee WHERE Employee.manager_nr = Chain.employee_nr  UNION   SELECT Employee.employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE employee_nr = 'U000001'  ) SELECT * FROM Chain;
SELECT Artist.name FROM Artist WHERE death_date = 'NULL';
SELECT Track.song FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND NOT Performs.role = 'vocals';

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Track, Artist, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Artist.artist_id = Performs.track_id AND COUNT( Track.track_id) > 2 GROUP BY COUNT(Track.track_id);
SELECT Track.song FROM Track WHERE album_id = 'Nevermind';
SELECT song FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Performs.role != 'vocals' AND Performs.artist_id != NULL;
SELECT title, SUM(duration) FROM Album, Track WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id;
SELECT album_id FROM Album, Release WHERE Album.album_id = Release.album_id AND Release.country = 'Belgium';

WITH RECURSIVE Managers (employee_nr) AS (SELECT X.manager_nr AS employee_nr FROM Employee X WHERE X.employee_nr = 'U000001' UNION (SELECT X.manager_nr AS employee_nr FROM Managers Y, Employee Y WHERE Y.employee_nr = X.employee_nr)) SELECT * FROM Managers;
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM Artist WHERE Artist.death_date = NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.role = 'guitarist';
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(track_id) as count FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id AND count >= 3 ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT artist_id FROM Performs  WHERE role = 'guitarist'

WITH RECURSIVE ManagedEmployees(nr) AS (SELECT E.employee_nr AS nr  FROM Employee E  WHERE E.nr = 'U000001'  UNION  SELECT E.manager_nr AS nr  FROM ManagedEmployees M, Employee E  WHERE M.nr = E.nr  AND NOT E.manager_nr IS NULL) SELECT * FROM ManagedEmployees

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Track.track_id) AS track_count FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id JOIN Track ON Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Track.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC
SELECT song FROM Track, Album WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id AND Album.album_id = 'Nevermind';
SELECT name FROM Artist WHERE death_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT title, SUM(duration) AS duration FROM Album, Track WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id GROUP BY album_id;

WITH RECURSIVE EmployeeManaged(employee_nr) AS ( SELECT employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE employee_nr = 'U000001' OR manager_nr = 'U000001' UNION SELECT employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE EmployeeManaged(manager_nr) = 'U000001' ) SELECT employee_nr;
SELECT album_id FROM Album, Release WHERE Album.album_id = Release.album_id AND country = 'Belgium';
SELECT song FROM Track NATURAL JOIN Album WHERE title = ´Nevermind´;
SELECT title, SUM(duration) FROM Album NATURAL JOIN TRACK;
SELECT artist_id FROM Performs WHERE role=´guitarist´;
SELECT album_id FROM Release WHERE country=´Belgium´;
SELECT DISTINCT song FROM Track NATURAL JOIN Performs WHERE role !=´vocals´ AND artist_id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Album, Track WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id GROUP BY Album.album_id;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*) AS count_tracks FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Artist.artist_id HAVING count_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY count_tracks DESC;
SELECT Track.song FROM Track,Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT *  FROM Track, Performs  WHERE Performs.role = 'vocals');
SELECT album_id FROM Release WHERE country = ´Belgium´;

SELECT title FROM Album; SELECT SUM(duration) FROM Track WHERE album_id = album_id.Album;
SELECT track_id FROM Performs WHERE role != 'vocals' AND NOT artist_id IS NULL; SELECT song FROM Track WHERE track_id = track_id.Performs;
SELECT album_id FROM Album WHERE title = 'Nevermind'; SELECT song FROM Track WHERE album_id = Album.album_id;
SELECT Album.album_id FROM Album, Release WHERE Album.album_id = Release.album_id AND country = ´Belgium´
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM Artist WHERE Artist.death_data IS NULL;

SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Artist.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id) >= 3) GROUP BY name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE EmployeeManager(employee_nr) AS ( SELECT E.employee_nr AS employee_nr FROM Employee E WHERE E.manager_nr = 'U000001' UNION SELECT E.employee_nr AS employee_nr FROM EmployeeManager M, Employee E WHERE M.employee_nr = E.employee_nr AND NOT E.employee_nr IS NULL ) SELECT * FROM EmployeeManager;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist a WHERE artist_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT p.artist_id, track_id  FROM Performs p ) HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
SELECT name FROM Employee  WHERE manager_nr = (SELECT employee_nr FROM Employee);

SELECT songs  FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Performs.role IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM Performs AS Performs2(artist_id2, track_id2,role2)            WHERE Performs.track_id = Performs2.track_id2             AND Performs.role =´vocals´);
SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id)  FROM Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id HAVING COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3  ORDER BY COUNT(Performs.track_id) DESC;
SELECT Track.song  From Track, Album WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id AND Album.title=´Nevermind´;
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Album, Album AS Album2(album_id2, title2), Track WHERE Album.album_id=Track.album_id AND Album.album_id = Album2.album_id2;
SELECT Artist.artist_id  FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Performs.role=´guitarist´ GROUP BY Artist.artist_id;
SELECT album_id FROM Release WHERE country=´Belgium´;
SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) as distinct_tracks FROM Artist a JOIN Performs p ON(a.artist_id = p.artist_id) GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) >2  ORDER BY distinct_tracks;
SELECT song FROM Track WHERE album_id = (    SELECT album_id    FROM Album   WHERE title = Nevermind);
SELECT t.song FROM Track t WHERE NOT EXISTS(        SELECT 1        FROM Performs p        WHERE t.track_id = p.track_id AND role= vocals);
SELECT album_id FROM Release  WHERE country = Belgium ;
SELECT title, SUM(duration) as total_duration FROM Track t JOIN Album a ON(t.album_id= a.album_id) GROUP BY album_id;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id  FROM Performs WHERE role = guitarist ;
SELECT Album.album_id FROM Album, Release  WHERE Album.album_id = Release.release_id and Release.country = 'Belgium';
SELECT Track.song  FROM Track, Performs WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT   FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_Id AND role = 'vocals' );
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*)  FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Artist.id  HAVING COUNT(Tracks.id) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;
SELECT Album.Title, SUM(duration)  FROM Track, Album WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id;
SELECT songs FROM Track,Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Track.artist_id AND NOT Track.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id FROM Performs WHERE role = 'vocals' OR role IS NULL)
SELECT artist_id FROM Artist , Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND role = 'guitarist' GROUP BY artist_id
SELECT songs FROM Track,Album WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id AND title = 'Nevermind'
SELECT album_id FROM Album , Release  WHERE Album.album_id = Release.album_id AND country = 'Belgium' GROUP BY album_id
SELECT titel,SUM(duration) FROM Album,Track WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id GROUP BY title

SELECT song FROM Track t WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT * FROM Performs p, Artist a WHERE t.track_id=p.track_id AND a.artist_id=p.artist_id AND p.role=´vocals´) AND EXISTS( SELECT * FROM Performs p, Artist a WHERE t.track_id=p.track_id AND a.artist_id=p.artist_id);

SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) FROM Artist a, Performs p, Track t WHERE a.artist_id=p.artist_id AND p.track_id=t.track_id GROUP BY name, p.track_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id)>=3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) DESC;
SELECT song FROM Track t, Album a WHERE a.album_id=t.album_id AND a.title=´Nevermind´;
SELECT a.title, SUM(t.duration) FROM Track t, Album a WHERE a.album_id=t.album_id;
SELECT a.album_id FROM Album a, Release r WHERE a.album_id=r.album_id AND r.country=´Belgium´;
SELECT song FROM Track WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT role FROM Performs WHERE track_id=Track.id AND role='vocals') AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Performs WHERE track_id=Track.id) > 0;

SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Album NATURAL JOIN Track GROUP BY album_id;  -- group by album_id so that two album's with the same title don't show up as one album with their durations together in one total
SELECT name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) AS tracks_played FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs WHERE COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3 GROUP BY name ORDER BY tracks_played DESC;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id  GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ;

WITH RECURSIVE ManagedByHan(id) AS ( SELECT E.manager_nr AS id FROM Employee E WHERE E.employee_nr = 'U000007' UNION SELECT E.manager_nr AS id FROM ManagedByHan M, Employee E WHERE M.id = E.id AND NOT E.employee_nr IS NULL ) ;   SELECT * FROM ManagedByHan ;
SELECT A.title, SUM(T.duration)  FROM Album A  NATURAL JOIN Track T GROUP BY A.album_id;

SELECT DISTINCT track_id FROM Track T WHERE NOT 'vocals' IN ( SELECT role FROM Performs P WHERE P.track_id = T.track_id ) AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT artist_id FROM Performs P WHERE P.track_id = T.track_id ));
SELECT T.track_id  FROM Track T NATURAL JOIN Album A WHERE A.title LIKE 'Nevermind';
SELECT A.name, COUNT(*) AS tracks_they_played FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY tracks_they_played DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE Managers(employee_nr) AS ( SELECT E.manager_nr AS employee_nr FROM Employee E WHERE employee_nr = 'U000001' UNION SELECT E.manager_nr AS employee_nr FROM Managers M, Employee E WHERE M.employee_nr = E.employee_nr AND NOT E.manager_nr IS NULL ) SELECT * FROM Managers;
SELECT T.song FROM Track T, Album A WHERE T.album_id = A.album_id AND A.title = ´Nevermind´;
SELECT album_id FROM Release WHERE country =´Belgium´;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id FROM Performs WHERE role =´guitarist´;

SELECT A.name, COUNT(T.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P, Track T WHERE P.artist_id = A.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(T.track_id) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(T.track_id) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT T.song FROM Track T WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT P.artist_id FROM Perfroms P WHERE P.track_id = T.track_id AND P.role =´vocals AND P.artist_id IS NULL );

SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(song) AS numberOfSongs FROM Track, Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id=Perfroms.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING numberOfSongs>=3 ORDER BY numberOfSongs DESC;
SELECT song FROM Track, Performs WHERE role<>'vocals' AND Track.track_id=Performs.track_id AND EXISTS (SELECT*FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id=Performs.track_id AND artist_id IS NOT NULL);
SELECT artist_id FROM Performs WHERE role='guitarist';

WITH RECURSIVE Managed(employee_nr) AS (SELECT employee_nr FROM Employee WHERE manager_nr IS NULL UNION SELECT E.employee_nr FROM Employee E, Managed M WHERE M.employee_nr=E.manager_nr) SELECT employee_nr FROM Managed;
SELECT title, SUM(duration) FROM Track GROUP BY album_id;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) AS stats FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id WHERE COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) >= 3 GROUP BY A.name ORDER BY stats DESC;

SELECT T.song FROM Track T  JOIN Performs P ON T.track_id = P.track_id WHERE T.track_id NOT IN (   SELECT DISTINCT T2.track_id   FROM Track AS T2 JOIN Performs AS P2 ON T2.track_id = P2.track_id   WHERE P2.role = 'vocals' ) AND NOT artist_id IS NULL;
SELECT Artist.name, SUM(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING count(Performs.track_id) > 2 DESC;
SELECT name FROM Artist WHERE death_date = NULL;

WITH RECURSIVE Manager (emolyee_nr) AS  ( SELECT E.emolyee_nr FROM Employee E  WHERE E.employee_nr = 'U000001'  UNION  SELECT E.employee_nr  FROM Employee E Manager M  WHERE M.employee_nr = E.manager_nr )  SELECT * FROM Manager;
SELECT DISTINCT song  FROM Track WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT P.role FROM Track T, Performs P, Artist A WHERE T.track_id=P.track_id AND P.role = 'vocals' AND A.name IS NOT NULL);
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) AS count  FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P  WHERE A.aritst_id=P.artist_id AND T.track_id=P.track_id  GROUP BY A.name  HAVING count >=3  ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) AS artist_track_count FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.artist_id HAVING artist_track_count >= 3 ORDER BY artist_track_count DESC;
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Album, Track WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id GROUP BY Album.album_id;

WITH RECURSIVE managed_by_han(id) AS (   SELECT employee_nr AS id   FROM Employee   WHERE manager_nr = 'U000001'   UNION   SELECT E.employee_nr AS id   FROM Employee E, managed_by_han M   WHERE E.manager_nr = M.employee_nr ) SELECT * FROM managed_by_han;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(P.track_id) DESC;

SELECT T.song FROM Track T WHERE NOT EXISTS (          SELECT T.track_id          FROM Track T, Performs P          WHERE P.track_id = T.track_id          AND P.role = 'vocals'          AND P.artist_id IS NULL );
SELECT DISTINCT A.name, COUNT(*) >= 3 FROM Artist A WHERE EXISTS (SELECT DISTINCT P.track_id FROM Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id) GROUP BY A.artist_id;
SELECT A.title, SUM(T.duration) AS duration FROM Track T, Album A WHERE T.album_id=A.album_id GROUP BY album_id;
SELECT DISTINCT artist_id  FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id   AND role = 'guitarist';

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Track.track_id) AS num_tracks FROM Artist, Performs, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Track.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;
SELECT Artist.name FROM Artist WHERE Artist.death_date IS NOT NULL;
